ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equities" (
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equity */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the equity */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company associated with the equity */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the equity is listed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the equity's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equity_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equity associated with this price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded price */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening price of the equity on the given date */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the equity on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the equity on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the equity on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the equity on the given date */,
  "10_avg" REAL /* 10-day moving average */,
  "20_avg" REAL /* 20-day moving average */,
  "50_avg" REAL /* 50-day moving average */,
  "adjustment_factor" REAL /* Adjustment factor for stock splits or other adjustments */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equity_prices_equity_id FOREIGN KEY ("equity_id") REFERENCES equities ("equity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equity accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_equity_id FOREIGN KEY ("equity_id") REFERENCES equities ("equity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name given to the portfolio by the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the portfolio is denominated */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_equities" (
  "portfolio_equity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-equity relation */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio containing the equity */,
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equity linked to the portfolio */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the equity held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the equity was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the equity was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the equity in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the portfolio equity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_equity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_equities_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_equities_equity_id FOREIGN KEY ("equity_id") REFERENCES equities ("equity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date for the index calculation */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the market index */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the index is denominated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_prices" (
  "index_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index price record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index associated with this price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded index price */,
  "opening_value" REAL /* Opening value of the market index on the given date */,
  "closing_value" REAL /* Closing value of the market index on the given date */,
  "high_value" REAL /* Highest value of the market index on the given date */,
  "low_value" REAL /* Lowest value of the market index on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the market index on the given date */,
  "adjustment_factor" REAL /* Adjustment factor for index adjustments */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the index price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_prices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL to the full article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equity the article is related to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_news_equity_id FOREIGN KEY ("equity_id") REFERENCES equities ("equity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_payments" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equity that paid the dividend */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Payment frequency (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the dividend is paid */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the dividend payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payments_equity_id FOREIGN KEY ("equity_id") REFERENCES equities ("equity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equity being rated */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who provided the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating assigned by the analyst (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or rationale for the rating */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., firm, external agency) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_equity_id FOREIGN KEY ("equity_id") REFERENCES equities ("equity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
